Description:
Project Revenant is a custom Zombies progression overhaul for Black Ops III focused on persistent leveling, XP progression, and expanded player progression systems across every vanilla Zombies map.

Earn XP through gameplay, level up across matches, and build your profile over time with a fully integrated progression framework featuring animated HUD elements, XP tracking, leveling systems, save support, and future prestige expansion.

Features:
? Persistent XP & Level Saving
? Custom Leveling System
? Animated XP HUD
? End-of-Round XP Summary
? Vanilla Map Support
? Scalable Progression Framework
? Built for Stability & Expansion

Survive. Level. Ascend.

Project Revenant transforms Zombies into a long-term progression experience while staying true to the classic BO3 atmosphere.
Title: Project Revenant
